rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Setting Hearing Date On Motion To Continue Action Against Deceased Defendant By Naming Her Personal Representative Stephen Hom
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANTs VLAD COOD and PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC's Motion For An Order Setting Hearing Date On Motion To Continue Action Against Deceased Defendant By Naming Her Personal Representative Stephen Hom GRANTED. Plaintiff to file its motion to Continue Action Against Deceased Defendant as a regularly noticed motion per CCP 1005. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to prepare order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL BOREEN VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT BARRETT DAFFIN FRAPPIER TREDERER & WEISS, LLP's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to allege facts to state each element of each cause of action as to this moving defendant. Allegations must be made in good faith and in light of authorities cited by the defendant. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL BOREEN VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK J TOBIN VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DYNASTY PROPERTIES, LLC, VS. JEFFREY KWONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Set Aside Default Judgmnt (Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction) {Re-Notice}
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT REBECCA FONG's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgmnt (Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction) DENIED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS G STEWART VS. STEVEN J FITZPATRICK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF DENNIS STEWART's MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. To the extent Plaintiff is contending that this motion was properly served on the clerk of the Court, there is no proof of such service on file. To the extent Plaintiff is seeking Court's permission to authorize service on the clerk of the Court by its December 28, 2018 submissions, Plaintiff cites no authority that such permission is required (in addition to CCP 1011(b)). Additionally, there is no indication on file that December 28, 2018 submissions have been properly serviced on Defendant in any manner authorized by law. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB VS. EMIL P MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment Order; Supporting Declartion Of Magdalena A. Apostolova, Memo Of P&A In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT MAGDALENA APOSTOLOVA's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice. The Court notes that on December 26, 2018 an Order Shortening Time was granted for Emil Milyakov to file a Motion to Vacate. The Court further notes that while an Ex-parte application for such OST was presented to the Court for consideration on December 21, 2018, no ex-parte application was filed with the Court. Therefore, December 26, 2018 order is stricken and is null and void. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY, FSB, DBA VS. EMIL P. MILYAKOV ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment Order; Suporting Declaration And Memorandum Ofpoitns & Authorities In Support Theof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT MAGDALENA APOSTOLOVA's Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file. CRC 3.1300(c). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOAN ASSERETO VS. LOUIS RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Discovery, And Request For Monetary Sanctins Against Defendant; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 2, 2019 line 8. PLAINTIFF JOAN ASSERETO's Motion To Compel Discovery, And Request For Monetary Sanctins Against Defendant GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections to Special Interrogatories, Set One; Form Interrogatories UD, Set One, Form Interrogatories General, Set One, Request for Production, Set One by hand-delivery within 3 days of notice of entry of this order. Defendant shall allow inspection of the property on a 3 day notice. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,110. = (501/CFH)
